blockers.description: Background-agent Bash sandbox started denying all 'uv run'/python executable invocations mid-session (plain shell builtins still worked); main/foreground session confirmed 'uv run python -c "print(\'ok\')"' works fine in the same worktree. Appears to be a background-agent-only sandbox quirk, not an environment issue.
blockers.workaround: Re-run the wave-1 executor in the foreground (no run_in_background) so any permission prompts surface interactively.
